name: maestro-flow
description: Intent-driven workflow orchestration for multi-agent AI development with adaptive lifecycle engine and self-reinforcing knowledge graph

scripts.build: cd dashboard && npx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cd .. && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const s='src/tools/impeccable/live/static',d='dist/src/tools/impeccable/live/static';if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){fs.copyFileSync(p.join(s,f),p.join(d,f))}}" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');for(const [s,d] of [['src/graph/db/schema.sql','dist/src/graph/db/schema.sql'],['src/graph/kg/schema.sql','dist/src/graph/kg/schema.sql']]){if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(d),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}}"
scripts.lint:session-run: node scripts/lint-invocation-policy.mjs && node scripts/lint-session-run-prompts.mjs && node scripts/lint-session-run-mirrors.mjs
scripts.sync:codex-skills: node scripts/sync-codex-run-mode.mjs --write && node scripts/sync-codex-run-mode.mjs --check && node scripts/lint-session-run-mirrors.mjs
scripts.build:mirrors: node scripts/lint-session-run-prompts.mjs && node scripts/convert-claude-to-agy.mjs && node scripts/build-agents-standard.mjs && node scripts/sync-codex-run-mode.mjs --write && node scripts/sync-codex-run-mode.mjs --check && node scripts/sync-codex-agents.mjs --check && node scripts/lint-session-run-mirrors.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/lint-invocation-policy.mjs && node scripts/lint-session-run-prompts.mjs && npm run check:docs-reference && npm run check:session-run-contract-parity && npm run build && npm run check:session-run-release-machine && npm run build:mirrors
